metadata.description: Claude has friends. On the calls that matter, it asks AIs from other families — Gemini, an isolated second Claude, optionally GPT — who catch the blind spots Claude can't see from the inside. Three styles, auto-picked by what you type. CLI-only, English-only docs.

plugins.name: claude-friends
plugins.description: Claude doesn't decide alone. On the calls that matter it asks its friends — Gemini (a different model family) and an isolated Claude with fresh eyes (same family, no parent context), optionally OpenAI GPT — who each catch blind spots the others miss. Three styles auto-picked by what you type: Devil's Advocate (one friend, quick critique), Boardroom Debate (the whole table in parallel, the headline pattern), Round-Table Discussion (3-round brainstorm for multi-option convergence). Not a second opinion you drag out of a reluctant assistant — a room of friends you trust. CLI-only, no MCP. Merges previous skill-gemini + skill-brainstorm + dont-ask-me.
